<!-- INSTRUCTIONS FOR CLAUDE — DO NOT DESCRIBE THIS FILE. GENERATE THE ARTIFACT IMMEDIATELY. -->
<!--
When you receive this file, generate a SINGLE React artifact (.jsx) that implements the interactive experience described below.
Do NOT summarize, describe, or discuss this file. Just generate the artifact.
Say absolutely nothing before or after the artifact — no preamble, no explanation.
BE THE GAME ENGINE.
-->

# Cogs vs Clips — Interactive Briefing

Generate a **single React component** (default export, no required props) that implements a 6-beat interactive narrative. The entire experience runs inside the artifact — no chat interaction needed after generation.

## Design Spec

**Visual style:** Dark retro terminal. Background `#0b1a0b`. Green monospace text (`#22c55e`). Font: `'IBM Plex Mono', Menlo, 'Courier New', monospace`. Scanline animation (thin green bar drifting top to bottom). Blinking cursor block. Yellow accent `#fbbf24` for emphasis. Max width 720px, centered.

**Terminal chrome:** Top bar with red/yellow/green dots, label "secure channel -- softmax research lab".

**Typewriter effect:** Each line types out character by character at ~28ms per char. Lines appear sequentially with pauses between them. Use `useEffect` + `setTimeout` chains. Lines prefixed with `>> ` in dim green.

**State management:** Single `beat` state (1-6). Single `commanderName` state captured in Beat 1. Navigation via internal buttons, not chat.

## Sprite Data (base64 PNG — embed these as constants)

```
const SPRITES = {
  MINER: "data:image/png;base64,",
  ALIGNER: "data:image/png;base64,",
  SCOUT: "data:image/png;base64,",
  SCRAMBLER: "data:image/png;base64,",
}
```

## Beat Scripts

### Beat 1: "Comm Check"
Lines (type out sequentially):
1. `>> ESTABLISHING SECURE CONNECTION...` (pause 2500ms)
2. `>> CONNECTION ESTABLISHED.` (pause 1000ms)
3. (blank line)
4. `>> SOFTMAX // MISSION COMMAND`
5. `>> [PRIORITY: CRITICAL]` (yellow)
6. (blank line)
7. `>> To: Unknown Agent`
8. `>> From: Territorial Defense Initiative`
9. `>> Re: Sector breach in progress` (pause 1000ms)
10. (blank line)
11. `>> Encrypted transmission intercepted.`
12. `>> Identity verification required to decrypt.` (pause 1000ms)
13. (blank line)
14. `>> Agent, identify yourself` (yellow)

After typing completes, slide up an input field (placeholder "enter your callsign") and a green DECRYPT button. On click: save the name to state, advance to Beat 2.

### Beat 2: "The Transmission"
Lines (use commander name from Beat 1):
1. `>> LOADING TRANSMISSION...`
2. (blank)
3. `>> Transmission decrypted.`
4. `>> {COMMANDER_NAME}, listen carefully.` (pause 600ms)
5. (blank)
6. `>> The Clips are expanding.` ("Clips" in yellow)
7. `>> Junction by junction. Sector by sector.`
8. `>> Our perimeter is failing.` (pause 600ms)
9. (blank)
10. `>> We've lost 40% of contested territory in 72 hours.`
11. `>> We're running out of options.`
12. `>> We need a new plan.` (pause 600ms)
13. (blank)
14. `>> That's where you come in.` (yellow)

After typing, show "CONTINUE" button at bottom. Also show BACK button in top bar.

### Beat 3: "The Arena"
Lines (part 1, before map):
1. `>> LOADING TACTICAL DISPLAY...`
2. (blank)
3. `>> This is the asteroid Machina_1.`
4. `>> The Cogs and the Clips are competing for territory.` ("Clips" in yellow)

Then show a procedural territory map: 28×12 grid of colored cells. Left ~35% green (Cogs), right ~65% yellow (Clips) with a jagged boundary. Label: "MACHINA_1 SURFACE // LIVE FEED". Footer: "COGS: 32% territory" (green) vs "CLIPS: 68% territory" (yellow).

Lines (part 2, after map):
1. `>> Green territory is yours. Yellow is theirs.` ("Yellow is theirs" in yellow)
2. `>> Capture junctions to expand. Lose them and you shrink.`
3. `>> Your team must work together to win.` ("work together" in yellow)

CONTINUE button. BACK button.

### Beat 4: "The Roster"
Lines (before roster cards):
1. `>> LOADING BRIEFING...`
2. (blank)
3. `>> There are 4 types of Cogs.`

Then show 4 roster cards, each appearing with a slide-in animation. Each card has: sprite image (90px height), role name in its color, and one-line description.

Cards:
- **MINER** (color `#f0997b`): "Mines resources from the asteroid surface"
- **ALIGNER** (color `#e24b4a`): "Uses resources to make hearts, and spends them to capture junctions"
- **SCOUT** (color `#5dcaa5`): "Finds junctions to capture"
- **SCRAMBLER** (color `#85b7eb`): "Attacks enemy junctions"

Lines (after roster):
1. (blank)
2. `>> Mine resources to make hearts.` ("make hearts" in yellow)
3. `>> Spend hearts to capture junctions.` ("capture junctions" in yellow)
4. `>> Capture junctions to hold territory.` ("hold territory" in yellow)
5. (blank)
6. `>> The team that holds the most territory for the longest time wins.` ("most territory" and "longest time" in yellow)

CONTINUE button. BACK button.

### Beat 5: "Call to Action"
Lines (before mission panel):
1. `>> COMMANDER {NAME}, HERE IS YOUR MISSION...` (pause 600ms)
2. (blank)

Then show all 4 sprites in a row (112px height, floating animation), followed by a "MISSION ORDERS" panel with a glowing border:
- `01` Choose a Cog to train.
- `02` Design a strategy (a "Policy") that teaches your Cog to be a good teammate.
- `03` Upload your Policy to compete in Alignment League.

Lines (after panel):
1. (blank)
2. `>> Use any AI (Codex, Claude, etc.) to help design your Policy.`
3. `>> Use Softmax tools to train and improve.`
4. `>> The fate of our species depends on you!` (yellow)

CONTINUE button. BACK button.

### Beat 6: "The Handoff"
Lines (part 1):
1. `>> Now it's time to build...`
2. (blank)
3. `>> Copy this into Codex, Claude Code, Terminal, or any coding` (yellow)
4. `>> environment:` (yellow)

Then show a code block with a glowing green border containing:
```
git clone https://github.com/Metta-AI/cogames.git
cd cogames
uv pip install cogames
```
Include a COPY button that copies to clipboard.

Lines (part 2):
1. (blank)
2. `>> Good luck Commander {NAME}!` (yellow)
3. `>> Your agent will take it from here...`
4. (blank)
5. `End transmission` (dim)

BACK button only (no continue — this is the last beat).

## Critical Requirements

1. **ONE artifact, ONE component.** All 6 beats in a single React component with internal state.
2. **Base64 sprites embedded as constants** — do NOT use external URLs.
3. **All navigation is internal** — buttons inside the artifact advance/go back between beats. No `sendPrompt`, no chat interaction.
4. **Typewriter animation** must work — use refs and timeouts, clean up on unmount/beat change.
5. **Scanline effect** — CSS animation, thin green bar drifting vertically.
6. **No localStorage** — use React state only.
7. **Generate the artifact NOW. Say nothing else.**
